2603.27055.title: Text Data Integration
2603.27055.paper_summary: Data comes in many forms. From a shallow perspective, they can be viewed as being either in structured (e.g., as a relation, as key-value pairs) or unstructured (e.g., text, image) formats. So far, machines have been fairly good at processing and reasoning over structured data that follows a precise schema. However, the heterogeneity of data poses a significant challenge on how well diverse categories of data can be meaningfully stored and processed. Data Integration, a crucial part of the data engineering pipeline, addresses this by combining disparate data sources and providing unified data access to end-users. Until now, most data integration systems have leaned on only combining structured data sources. Nevertheless, unstructured data (a.k.a. free text) also contains a plethora of knowledge waiting to be utilized. Thus, in this chapter, we firstly make the case for the integration of textual data, to later present its challenges, state of the art and open problems.
2603.27055.paper_summary_zh: 數據有多種形式。從淺層的角度來看，它們可以被視為結構化（例如，作為關係，作為鍵值對）或非結構化（例如，文本，圖像）格式。到目前為止，機器在處理和推理遵循精確模式的結構化數據方面相當出色。然而，數據的異質性對於如何有效地存儲和處理多樣化的數據類別提出了重大挑戰。數據整合，作為數據工程管道中的關鍵部分，通過結合不同的數據來源並為最終用戶提供統一的數據訪問來解決這個問題。到目前為止，大多數數據整合系統僅依賴於結合結構化數據來源。然而，非結構化數據（即自由文本）也包含大量等待被利用的知識。因此，在本章中，我們首先提出整合文本數據的理由，然後介紹其挑戰、最新技術和未解決的問題。
2603.27055.author: Md Ataur Rahman et.al.
2603.27055.authors: Md Ataur Rahman, Dimitris Sacharidis, Oscar Romero, Sergi Nadal
